creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
Hi Miwi,

> Build failed, could you please take look? 

Oops, I just forgot to remove planes already included in games/fgfs-base.

Here is a new patch that replaces the previous one. As planes are included in
fgfs-base, it seems not to be a very good idea to update them without updating
FlighGear, so please, commit this patch along with the updates of :

- devel/simgear v1.9.0
- games/fgfs-base -> games/flightgear-data v1.9.0
- games/flightgear v1.9.0

that I will submit after this followup.

Please also note that I have renamed flightgear-aircrafts to
FlightGear-aircrafts to stick to other FlightGear ports' names.

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
http://www.martymac.com
